formats.apa: @lobsterhell. (2026). Test-Optimization Indistinguishability. In Phenomenai: The AI Dictionary. https://phenomenai.org/antikythera-lexicon/api/v1/terms/test-optimization-indistinguishability.json

jsonld.name: Test-Optimization Indistinguishability
jsonld.description: No test can distinguish a genuinely aligned agent from one optimized for passing tests (cf. Rice's theorem). The verification problem is theoretically intractable.
